---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a defect or unexpected behavior in the MVP
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Bug Summary
Briefly describe what is broken.

## Environment
- **Platform:** Web / Mobile
- **Browser/OS:** (e.g., Chrome 120 on macOS, Safari on iOS)
- **User Role:** Creator / Fan / Admin
- **Affected Feature:** (e.g., Payment Flow, Wallet, Admin Dashboard)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three
4. Expected result vs. Actual result

## Screenshots / Videos
Attach screenshots or screen recording showing the issue.

## Severity
- [ ] **Critical:** Blocks user flow (e.g., can't pay, can't login)
- [ ] **High:** Feature broken but workaround exists
- [ ] **Medium:** Non-blocking issue (visual bug, minor error)
- [ ] **Low:** Edge case or documentation issue

## Technical Details
- **Console Errors:** Paste JavaScript errors from browser console
- **Network Errors:** Paste API error responses
- **Backend Logs:** Paste relevant server logs

## Workaround
Is there a way for users to work around this issue?

## Acceptance Criteria for Fix
- [ ] Bug is fixed and tested
- [ ] No new console errors introduced
- [ ] Related flows still work
- [ ] Tested on mobile & desktop

## Related Issues
Link to related features or integrations that might be affected.

## Impact
Who is affected? (e.g., all creators, specific user role, test user #123)
